data.title: Paxos Introduces Stablecoin Salary Option for Employees
data.description:
According to PANews, Paxos has announced a new feature allowing employees to receive part of their salary in the form of the stablecoin USDG, following an integration partnership with Toku. This integration utilizes existing payroll platforms ADP and Workday, enabling employees to directly receive USDG in their personal wallets. Unlike traditional payroll checks, the settlement for those opting for USDG is immediate, allowing instant access to the stablecoin.

Paxos highlighted in a press release that by adopting USDG for payroll, they offer their team the most direct way to engage with and experience USDG in daily life. As more companies integrate Toku's payroll channels, thousands of employees worldwide will have the opportunity to receive USDG directly at the source of their income.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Address Cryptocurrency Policy
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to deliver a speech at 3 p.m. Eastern Time (UTC+8, October 24, 3:00 a.m.). Speculation suggests that the address may focus on cryptocurrency policy, potentially involving the United States' strategic Bitcoin reserves.

data.title: OKX now opens MET call auction
data.description: OKX has officially announced the upcoming listing of MET (Meteora) and the conversion of pre-market MET contracts to standard perpetual contracts. Meteora is a decentralized exchange dedicated to providing secure, sustainable, and composable liquidity infrastructure for the Solana ecosystem and the broader DeFi space. The specific schedule is as follows: 1. MET call auction period: 9:00 PM to 10:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 23, 2025. 2. MET/USDT spot trading opening time: 10:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 23, 2025. 3. MET/USDT pre-market contract conversion period: Within three hours of 10:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 23, 2025. As long as the index remains stable during this period, the contract conversion will be completed. 4. MET withdrawals open: October 24, 2025, 1:00 AM (UTC+8)

data.title: These key support levels can help Bitcoin avoid a ‘bear flag’ crash to $88K
data.description:
Bitcoin traded 13% below its $126K all-time high as traders say the BTC price could drop to $88K over the next few days if key support levels don’t hold.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-levels-help-bitcoin-avoid-bear-flag-crash-88k?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_refresh%3Dgnoksa%26_t%3D1761226922591&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Global hedge‑fund assets hit record $5 trillion as inflows surge
data.description:
The global hedge-fund industry has reached a record $5 trillion in total asset value, as investors pushed massive amounts of money into alternative strategies while funds delivered strong gains. The figure, reported by Hedge Fund Research Inc. (HFR) on Thursday, shows nearly $34 billion in net inflows during the three months through September — the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/global-hedge%e2%80%91fund-assets-record-5-trillion/

data.title: Genius Group, a US-listed company, is issuing a Bitcoin reward of $0.10 per share to eligible shareholders.
data.description: Genius Group Limited (GNS), a US-listed education company, announced a Bitcoin bonus of $0.10 per share to eligible shareholders. Shareholders are required to transfer their shares from their brokerage firm to VStock, the company's designated transfer agent, for book registration and hold them for six months. Currently, 60.3% of the company's shares are book registered.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulator Plans Enhancements for Tokenized Funds
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) is set to introduce several enhancements aimed at advancing the trading of tokenized funds on virtual asset trading platforms (VATP). Cai Fengyi, the Executive Director of the SFC's Investment Products Division, announced these upcoming measures, which include the addition of payment and settlement functions on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange's fund platform.

Cai emphasized the need for more regulatory frameworks or risk prevention measures for the secondary market trading of tokenized funds. Discussions are currently underway with fund companies and relevant trading platforms to establish appropriate measures. The recent clarification that secondary market trading of tokenized funds is exempt from stamp duty is expected to facilitate progress in this area.

data.title: Binance Founder CZ Says Tokenized Gold Isn’t Truly ‘On-Chain’ — And It’s Stirring Debate
data.description:
Binance founder CZ has challenged Peter Schiff's proposal for tokenized gold, arguing it relies on trust in third parties rather than being truly on-chain, sparking a debate on digital asset security.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/binance-founder-cz-says-tokenized-gold-isnt-truly-on-chain-and-its-stirring-debate/

data.title: DePIN+RWA-driven environmental protection ecological agreement ECO Protocol is officially launched
data.description: ECO Protocol, an Ethereum-based RWA environmental protection ecosystem protocol, has officially launched, leveraging the dual innovations of DePIN and RWA to address financing challenges in the environmental protection industry. The protocol's first application focuses on oil and gas recovery, connecting the EVR 2.0, a gas liquefaction recovery unit from South Korea's ECOMAGIC, to the network. This unit, featuring patented cryogenic condensation technology, achieves zero oil and gas emissions and has been deployed in markets such as South Korea, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East. ECO Protocol is reportedly expanding into the Chinese market, providing chemical companies with hazardous gas solutions and carbon reduction data, addressing financing challenges for environmental protection companies by transforming environmental protection equipment into computing nodes to support AI computing. Using RWA technology, it tokenizes equipment and revenue, streamlining cross-border transactions and opening up new financing channels for environmental protection projects.
